summary: The test suite test_tcl failed (2 failures) during the test run; re-running the failed tests in verbose mode still produced a failure, causing the overall CI job to fail.
root_cause: The test module test_tcl failed with two test failures; a re-run in verbose mode did not fix them (one test failed again), causing the test run to be marked FAILED.

evidence.reason: Shows the specific test module that failed and the number of failures.

evidence.quote: Re-running 1 failed tests in verbose mode in subprocesses
evidence.reason: Indicates the test harness attempted to re-run the failing test(s) in verbose mode.
Shows that the re-run did not resolve the failure and at least one test remained failing.
Shows the command used to run the test suite, confirming this was a test-time runtime failure rather than a compile error.
Confirms the test run ended with failures and overall FAILED status.

suggested_fix: Run the failing test module in verbose mode locally to capture the failing assertion and traceback (e.g. python -m test test_tcl -v or use the same python_d.exe invocation shown in the log), inspect the verbose output for the exact failing test and assertion, and fix the test or underlying code accordingly.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-11 F2 fix the shim didn't persist model_info into rows. Backfilled from known run-time env (CILOGBENCH_OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-5-mini, default base_url, default max_completion_tokens=4096). resolved_model and system_fingerprint not recoverable from original API responses.
